{{CargoRelic
|name=Holy Nail
|class_id=21207
|rank=AA
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=01-03
|source=
|description=On Jan 3, 34 AD, this Holy Nail was kept by devout believers of St. Paul as a great treasure.<br>After Jesus' crucifixion, St. Paul took the nails out of his tomb. Legend has it that 3 nails were used for the crucifixion of Jesus, while others said 4 were used. Another legend said that 1 of the nails was melted to make a crown. Another nail was said to be thrown into the roaring waves to calm the sea and only 1 nail was left now.
[Basic Info]
Quantity: 5. Size: 5-7 inches. Use: Restrain zombies and vampires.
|fame=31
|art=40
|fth=67
|civ=47
|tech=43
|ss1=Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +40<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +4
|ss2=Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +80<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +8
|ss3=Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +120<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +12
|ss4=Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +200<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +20
|ss5=Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +28
|ss7=Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +28<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, B-tads gained +7.5%
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: Snail DEF +30
}}
